Uses of Class
com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.Model

  • Packages that use Model 
    Package Description
    com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
    Provides domain classes representing objects of the Gemini API.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.tool
    Provides common utilities and base classes for the Gemini4J library.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.impl
    Provides implementations for Gemini API resource interfaces.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.spec
    Provides specifications and interfaces for Gemini API resources.

    • Uses of Model in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain

      Methods in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain that return Model 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      Model Model.ModelBuilder.build()  
      Model Model.setBaseModelId​(String baseModelId)
      Required.
      Model Model.setDescription​(String description)
      A short description of the model.
      Model Model.setDisplayName​(String displayName)
      The human-readable name of the model.
      Model Model.setInputTokenLimit​(Integer inputTokenLimit)
      Maximum number of input tokens allowed for this model.
      Model Model.setMaxTemperature​(Double maxTemperature)
      Max value supported by model.
      Model Model.setName​(String name)
      Required.
      Model Model.setOutputTokenLimit​(Integer outputTokenLimit)
      Maximum number of output tokens available for this model.
      Model Model.setSupportedGenerationMethods​(List<String> supportedGenerationMethods)
      The model's supported generation methods.
      Model Model.setTemperature​(Double temperature)
      Controls the randomness of the output.
      Model Model.setTopK​(Integer topK)
      For Top-k sampling.
      Model Model.setTopP​(Double topP)
      For Nucleus sampling.
      Model Model.setVersion​(String version)
      Required.

      Modifier and Type Method Description
      List<Model> ModelTool.getModels()
      Gets the list of available Gemini models.
      Method parameters in com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.tool with type arguments of type Model 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void ModelTool.update​(List<Model> models)
      Updates the list of models using the provided list of models.

      Retrieves a specific Gemini model by its name.
